pdf-create.iteration_3_note: model stuck in loop using python -c with shell escaping errors

changes: Massively reduced SKILL.md from ~300 lines to ~80 lines, removing reference.md, forms.md, and scripts/ references

Added critical instruction to always write Python to .py files instead of using python -c, which caused shell escaping failures
Replaced complex multi-library examples with simple, focused patterns matching task requirements
Removed all form-filling content, advanced library references, and CLI tools not needed for tasks
